label: POST /orders
description: Primary checkout entry point. Receives a cart submission from an authenticated user and initiates the order creation process.

label: GET /orders/{id}
description: Fetches a single order by ID. Only the order owner or an admin may access.

label: PATCH /orders/{id}/status
description: Admin-only endpoint for manually updating order status. Used for support escalations and fulfilment edge cases.

label: Consume payment.completed
description: Receives payment confirmation from the Payment Service via Kafka. Transitions the order from AWAITING_PAYMENT to CONFIRMED and triggers fulfilment.

label: Consume payment.failed
description: Receives payment failure notification from the Payment Service via Kafka. Transitions the order to PAYMENT_FAILED and notifies the customer.
